review_title: Reliable and Efficient Data Protection with Xopero ONE Backup & Recovery
author: Shashwat V.
pros: What I liked most about Xopero ONE Backup & Recovery is its intuitive interface and comprehensive backup options. It offers reliable cloud storage, flexible scheduling, and efficient recovery processes, ensuring data is always secure and easily accessible.
cons: What I liked least about Xopero ONE Backup & Recovery is that the initial setup can be somewhat complex and time-consuming. It might require a bit of technical knowledge to configure all the options correctly, which could be challenging for less experienced usersm
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: With this software, I have been able to create a complete backup system and not have to constantly check to see why copies are not being made.

cons: At this point I can't think of anything.

review_title: Peace of Mind for Critical Data
description: I have been an IT Project Manager and faced the problem of scattered data backups and poor recovery solutions. Xopero ONE has become a game-changer, especially in cases like the crash of our server, where we seamlessly restored our virtual machines without a hitch. The security it offers has transformed our disaster recovery strategy.
author: Zsombor L.
pros: Most impressive is the breadth of coverage—backing up endpoints, virtual machines, even Microsoft 365 data. The flexibility to use local storage or S3-compatible clouds is invaluable, and the interface is intuitive even for a complex environment.
cons: The configuration of cloud backups does occasionally strain our network during peak hours, but it's a minor sin considering the benefits it brings.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Xopero ONE Backup & Recovery: A User-Friendly Option for Complete Data Protection
description: Xopero ONE shines in its focus on usability. The user-friendly interface makes it a breath of fresh air compared to complex backup solutions. For businesses that prioritize ease of use, it's a clear winner.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The emphasis on a user-friendly interface is a major strength. Complex backup solutions can be daunting, so Xopero's ease of use makes it accessible to a wider range of users, even those without extensive IT expertise.
cons: Ideally, there would be more readily available information on pricing structures. This lack of transparency can make it difficult to budget and compare Xopero ONE with other options.
